popularStory.headline: who is Gaucher V de Chattillon
popularStory.description: Gaucher V de Châtillon, Lord of Châtillon, Count of Porcien, was constable of Champagne in 1284 and then Constable of France during the reigns of five different kings. He was also tutor to the future …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaucher V de Châtillon於1252年6月24日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Gaucher IV de Chatillon28歲，母親Isabelle de Villehardouin17歲。他於1281年與Isabelle de Dreux結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年9月10日享年77歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉馬內庫易利-朋吉奧-達斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaucher V de Châtillon于1252年6月24日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Gaucher IV de Chatillon28岁，母亲Isabelle de Villehardouin17岁。他于1281年与Isabelle de Dreux结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年9月10日享年77岁，埋葬在法国瑟-吉馬內庫易利-朋吉奧-達斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Francoise, Jacques, Laurette, Lucien, Philippe.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Walhari, composed of the elements walh ‘stranger’ and hari ‘army’.

variants.name: Coetzee
meanings: Afrikaans: probably an altered form of Dutch Goetzee, which is of French Huguenot origin, probably from Gaucher . Alternatively, Coetzee may be an altered form of Dutch Kuzee, a habitational name recorded in the 16th century as Cudsee and Cutsee, from a toponym located in Zeeland, which may be interpreted as Cut's-see ‘watercourse of Cudo’.
History: Dirk Coetzee, born in Kampen in the Netherlands around 1655, died in Cape Town in 1725.

en.lifeSummary: When Gaucher V de Châtillon was born on 24 June 1252, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Gaucher IV de Chatillon, was 28 and his mother, Isabelle de Villehardouin, was 17. He married Isabelle de Dreux in 1281. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 September 1329, at the age of 77, and was buried in Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaucher V de Châtillon est né le 24 juin 1252, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Gaucher IV de Chatillon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Villehardouin, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Dreux en 1281. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1329, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaucher V de Châtillon am 24. Juni 1252 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gaucher IV de Chatillon 28 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Villehardouin 17. Er hat 1281 Isabelle de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. September 1329 im Alter von 77 Jahren und wurde in Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher V de Châtillon è nato il il 24 giugno 1252 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gaucher IV de Chatillon, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Villehardouin, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Dreux nel 1281. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1329, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaucher V de Châtillonが1252年6月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Gaucher IV de Chatillonは28歳，母Isabelle de Villehardouinは17歳であった。1281年にIsabelle de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年9月10日に77歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンコウイリ-プオント-アウクス-ダムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaucher V de Châtillon(이)가 1252년 6월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gaucher IV de Chatillon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Villehardouin(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1281년 Isabelle de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 9월 10일 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 코우이리-폰트-오스-다메스에 묻혔다.

mn.24 June 1252–10 de setembro de 1329: 1252 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24–1329 оны Есдүгээр сарын 10

pt.24 June 1252–10 de setembro de 1329: 24 de junho de 1252–10 de setembro de 1329
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaucher V de Châtillon nasceu em 24 de junho de 1252, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Gaucher IV de Chatillon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Villehardouin, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Dreux em 1281. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1329, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaucher V de Châtillon родился 24 июня 1252 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gaucher IV de Chatillon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Villehardouin, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Dreux в 1281 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 сентября 1329 г. в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности коуилли-понт-аукс-дэмесь, сине-ет-марн, Франция.

sm.from 1283 to 1295: mai le 1283 e o'o I le 1295

es.24 June 1252–10 de setembro de 1329: 24 de junio de 1252–10 de septiembre de 1329
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaucher V de Châtillon nació el 24 de junio de 1252, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gaucher IV de Chatillon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Villehardouin, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Dreux en 1281. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1329, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
